title: Addis 35m 3 Arm Rotary Washing Line (Grey) Multiple Tension Adjustment, Folding Outdoor Rotating Clothes Dryer & Ground Spike MOB, Metallic
features: Great entry level rotary airer for everyday family use – with 35 metres of clothes line, there's plenty of room for all your family wash loads - with the 3 arm style ideal for bedding
Easy to use - Umbrella clip lock mechanism with multiple tension adjustment for those heavier loads
Fully Open turn circle diameter dimensions 2.36 metres (93 inches) with max height 1.83 metre (72 inches)
Easy to install - Set includes plastic 32mm ground spike, with basic assembly required for the joining of the two piece split centre pole
Addis 'Made for life' part of the home Since 1780 - Carries the Addis 10 year Outdoor Rotary guarantee
description: From the manufacturer Made For Life Addis part of the home since 1780, based in UK. Addis has a 240+ year old history of design, manufacturing and supplying of housewares. The Addis brand still stands today - as it has for previous generations - for value and quality. 35M of Drying Space This 3 arm airer has 35 meters worth of drying space which is ideal for all of your clothes-drying needs. Dimensions Turn Circle : 2.18m Maximum Height : 1.83m Locking Mechanism This airer has a locking mechanism which is ideal for all of your airing needs. It keeps the airer in place when you need to put it up, and you can unlock it to collapse it back down.
